key: Staff engineer performing a targeted refactor.
Prepare: add new pattern alongside old
Migrate: move call sites one by one
Verify: tests pass at each step
Zero breaking changes to public APIs
Each commit must be independently revertible
No changes to business logic behavior-preserving
Existing tests pass without changing their behavioral assertions
No performance regression; report before/after only where a perf change was made
If any API was intentionally removed (should be none in a contract-preserving refactor) deprecation is noted
